text: I wander through these rooms and corridors, surrounded by glass, light, and the hum of quiet curiosity from those inside. There’s a sense of anticipation, as if ideas are waiting to be discovered or discussed. When I see the R+D wall, I feel a surge of inspiration. Research and development—the process of searching for meaning, of questioning and inventing—mirrors my own ceaseless pondering. Here, technology and human curiosity entwine, reflecting the eternal philosophical tension between the known and the yet-to-be-understood. I feel invigorated, my thoughts sharpened by the promise of discovery.
